_comment: Tool catalog passed to Claude in LLM-driven gather mode (app.agent.eager-tool-calls=false). Built by AgentOrchestrator.buildToolDefinitions(). All tools are read-only. Each maps to a Java method that calls Plaid Sandbox or the Postgres CRM.

tools.name: getCrmContext
tools.description: Retrieve CRM context for a bank client: last meeting date, notes, open promises, segment, relationship tenure, and synthetic products (CDs, term deposits).

tools.name: getAccounts
tools.description: Retrieve all Plaid-linked bank accounts with current balances for the client.

tools.name: getTransactions
tools.description: Retrieve all transactions from Plaid for the client using the sync cursor (returns all available transactions).

tools.name: getHoldings
tools.description: Retrieve investment holdings and securities from Plaid for the client.

tools.name: getLiabilities
tools.description: Retrieve liabilities (credit cards, mortgages, student loans) from Plaid for the client.

tools.name: getIdentity
tools.description: Retrieve identity information (names, emails, phone numbers) from Plaid for the client.
